text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come tomorrow morning, we'll be leaving this
camp behind and returning to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer—are you good at dancing?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes. At the end of Princess Fighter, the legendary
princess dances with the prince under a starry sky.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And that's when the prince realizes that he was
Legendary Trainer all along.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And that's when the prince realizes that he was
Legendary Trainer all along.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So, would you like to dance for one song? We
can even do a folk dance if you prefer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Well, even if you refuse, I think we both know
who the legendary trainer is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, summer comes to a close.
